Name: sapdme_sfc
Title: Shop Floor Control Production Activities
ShortText: Perform production activities on a Shop Floor Control, such as start, complete, serialize, relabel, split, merge, scrap and set quantity

The code never returned 204 and the documentation was incorrect.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"11 Dec 2023","notes":"Clarified wording in Work List API descriptions.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"25 Jun 2023","notes":"Added new parameter plant to alternateResource endpoint","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"23 May 2023","notes":"Added parameter routingStepId to request to merge the SFC on relaxed routing; Added API for placing and releasing hold on one or more SFCs; Added: new parameter to /sfc/worklist/xxxx end points to handle process industry Orders/SFCs.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"12 Nov 2022","notes":"Added: new parameter to process SFC requests asynchronously.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Aug 2022","notes":"Added: endpoints SFC routing step activity, get in work SFCs at a resource, http conflict error code to existing endpoints; Adjusted: moved operation scheduled start date, operation scheduled completion date to be part of step/operation data.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Jun 2022","notes":"Added API for SFC to update alternate Resource. Added Endpoint for SFC batch update.  Added defaultSfcBatchId to worklist and SFC detail related endpoints.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"21 Aug 2021","notes":"Added new parameters to split SFC API.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"22 May 2021","notes":"Added API for setting SFC quantity","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"13 Feb 2021","notes":"Added API for triggering an SFC selection event.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"6 Nov 2020","notes":"Added API for split and merge of an SFC.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"15 Aug 2020","notes":"Added API for serialize and relabel of an SFC.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Feb 2020","notes":"First version","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
